trials.title: Synthetic Phase II Study of Mock-Drug-A in Advanced NSCLC
trials.trial_description: A synthetic phase II single-arm study evaluating mock-drug-A in adults with advanced non-small cell lung cancer. Entirely fictional; for harness validation only.
trials.inclusion_criteria_text: Age 18 years or older. Histologically confirmed stage IIIB-IV non-small cell lung cancer. ECOG performance status 0-1.
trials.exclusion_criteria_text: Prior systemic therapy for advanced disease. Active untreated brain metastases.
trials.eligibility_criteria_raw:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Age 18 years or older
- Histologically confirmed stage IIIB-IV non-small cell lung cancer
- ECOG performance status 0-1

Exclusion Criteria:
- Prior systemic therapy for advanced disease
- Active untreated brain metastases

trials.title: Synthetic Phase III Study of Mock-Drug-B in Advanced NSCLC
trials.trial_description: A synthetic phase III randomized study of mock-drug-B versus standard of care in advanced non-small cell lung cancer. Entirely fictional; for harness validation only.
trials.inclusion_criteria_text: Age 18 years or older. Advanced non-small cell lung cancer. ECOG performance status 0-2. Adequate renal function (creatinine clearance >= 45 mL/min).
trials.exclusion_criteria_text: Prior platinum-based chemotherapy. Uncontrolled cardiac disease.
trials.eligibility_criteria_raw:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Age 18 years or older
- Advanced non-small cell lung cancer
- ECOG performance status 0-2
- Adequate renal function (creatinine clearance >= 45 mL/min)

Exclusion Criteria:
- Prior platinum-based chemotherapy
- Uncontrolled cardiac disease

trials.title: Synthetic Study of Mock-Drug-C in Type 2 Diabetes
trials.trial_description: A synthetic study of mock-drug-C added to metformin in adults with inadequately controlled type 2 diabetes. Entirely fictional; for harness validation only.
trials.inclusion_criteria_text: Age 30-75 years. Type 2 diabetes on stable metformin for at least 3 months. HbA1c between 7.5% and 10.0%.
trials.exclusion_criteria_text: Type 1 diabetes. eGFR below 45 mL/min/1.73m2. Current insulin use.
trials.eligibility_criteria_raw:
Inclusion Criteria:
- Age 30-75 years
- Type 2 diabetes on stable metformin for at least 3 months
- HbA1c between 7.5% and 10.0%

Exclusion Criteria:
- Type 1 diabetes
- eGFR below 45 mL/min/1.73m2
- Current insulin use
